name: slack-message-to-google-tasks
label: Create Google Task for Slack Message Containing Keyword

description.overview: Automatically creates a Google Task when a Slack message contains a specific keyword
description.details:
This recipe provides **instant task creation** from Slack conversations to Google Tasks:

**Features:**
- Triggers when a new message is posted to your Slack channel
- Filters messages containing a specific keyword (e.g., "@task", "TODO", "reminder")
- Automatically creates a new task in your Google Tasks list
- Captures message content as task description
- Includes sender information for context
- Enables quick task capture without leaving Slack
- Integrates with Google Workspace task management

**Task Details:**
- Task title derived from message content
- Full message text as task notes
- Sender username for reference
- Timestamp of message creation
- Optional: Due date parsing from message content

**Prerequisites:**
- Slack workspace with appropriate channel access
- Google Tasks account (Google Workspace or personal Gmail)
- Pre-configured Google Tasks list
- Defined keyword trigger (configurable)

**Ideal for:**
- Individuals managing personal tasks from team conversations
- Remote workers capturing action items from meetings
- Teams using Google Workspace for task management
- Project coordinators tracking deliverables mentioned in Slack
- Professionals maintaining personal to-do lists from work discussions
